ISO OFFICE

Management Simulator

Survive 10 sprints as a Project Manager in a chaotic software office. Master ISO/IEC standards or face project failure.

📖 ISO Standards Codex

ISO 9001 (Quality Management)

Focuses on meeting customer requirements, enhancing satisfaction, and driving continuous improvement in quality processes.

ISO/IEC 27001 (Information Security)

Provides a framework for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS) to keep data assets secure and manage risks.

ISO/IEC 12207 (Software Life Cycle)

Establishes a common framework for software life cycle processes, from concept through retirement, including requirements and testing.

ISO 31000 (Risk Management)

Offers principles and generic guidelines on risk management to help organizations identify, assess, and mitigate risks effectively.

ISO/IEC 25010 (Software Quality)

Defines a quality model with eight characteristics (like performance, security, maintainability) for evaluating software products.

ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119 (Software Testing)

An internationally agreed set of standards for software testing that can be used within any software development life cycle.

ISO/IEC 15288 (System Life Cycle)

Covers processes and lifecycle stages for systems engineered using hardware, software, and human elements.

ISO 10006 (Quality in Projects)

Gives guidance on the application of quality management in projects, ensuring deliverables meet objectives and standards.
